question: Kas organisatsioon teab, millised süsteemid ja andmed on töö jätkumiseks kõige kriitilisemad?
help: Näiteks raamatupidamine, kliendiandmed, failiserver, e-post, tootmissüsteemid.

attack_mappings.relationship: Prepared response reduces delay after ransomware impact has begun.

why_it_matters: Ransomware response is slower and more damaging when nobody knows which systems and data are most critical to keep the organization running.
what_good_looks_like: Critical systems, datasets and business dependencies are listed and prioritized for response and recovery.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if the organization can name and prioritize the systems and data it depends on.
common_misunderstanding: Knowing the IT environment in general is not the same as knowing what must be restored first during ransomware recovery.
scoring_note: This question matters because prioritization improves decision speed during a ransomware incident.

question: Kas kriitilistest andmetest tehakse regulaarsed varukoopiad?
help: Hinnake ainult ärikriitilisi andmeid ja süsteeme.

attack_mappings.relationship: Recoverability reduces uncertainty after data encryption impact.

why_it_matters: Ransomware recovery is much harder when business-critical data is not backed up at all.
what_good_looks_like: Regular backups cover the most important systems and datasets, not only low-value files.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if business-critical data is actually backed up on a defined schedule.
common_misunderstanding: Having some storage snapshots or ad hoc copies is not the same as having dependable backups for critical data.
scoring_note: Backup coverage is foundational, but later questions test whether that coverage is trustworthy during ransomware recovery.

question: Kas varukoopiate tegemise sagedus on selgelt määratud ja jälgitav?
help: Näiteks iga päev / iga nädal ning keegi kontrollib, kas tööd õnnestusid.

attack_mappings.relationship: Recoverability reduces uncertainty after data encryption impact.

why_it_matters: Undefined or unmonitored backup frequency creates hidden data-loss risk during ransomware recovery.
what_good_looks_like: Backup frequency is documented, appropriate for the business and someone checks whether jobs succeed.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if backup frequency and success monitoring are both clear.
common_misunderstanding: A vendor saying backups exist is not enough if no one checks timing and success.
scoring_note: This control supports backup reliability and data-loss planning.

question: Kas varukoopiatest taastamist on viimase 6 kuu jooksul testitud?
help: Ainult backupi olemasolust ei piisa; ransomware olukorras loeb taastamine.

attack_mappings.relationship: Recoverability reduces uncertainty after data encryption impact.

why_it_matters: Backups only reduce ransomware impact if the organization can actually restore systems and data from them.
what_good_looks_like: A recent restore test was completed, documented and showed that critical systems or data can be restored within acceptable time and data-loss limits.
evidence_examples: name of restored system or dataset
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if restore was actually tested. Answer partial if testing exists but coverage, freshness or documentation is unclear.
common_misunderstanding: Having backups is not the same as knowing that restore will work during a ransomware incident.
scoring_note: Restore testing has high scoring weight because recovery capability is one of the most important ransomware resilience controls.

question: Kas vähemalt üks varukoopia on ransomware'i eest kaitstud: offline, immutable või eraldatud õigustega?
help: Kui ründaja saab backupi kustutada või krüpteerida, ei ole see lunavara puhul usaldusväärne.

attack_mappings.relationship: Recoverability reduces uncertainty after data encryption impact.

why_it_matters: Ransomware can delete or encrypt reachable backups, removing the main recovery option.
what_good_looks_like: At least one backup copy is offline, immutable or protected by separate permissions that limit ransomware impact.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if at least one backup copy is clearly protected from normal domain compromise.
common_misunderstanding: A backup on the same reachable environment may not survive the same attack that hits production.
scoring_note: Protected backup copies carry high weight because they directly influence whether recovery remains possible.

question: Kas on teada, kui kiiresti tuleb kriitilised süsteemid taastada ja kui palju andmekadu on lubatav?
help: See on lihtsustatud RTO/RPO küsimus.

attack_mappings.relationship: Recoverability reduces uncertainty after data encryption impact.

why_it_matters: Ransomware decisions are harder when the organization has not defined acceptable downtime or data loss for critical services.
what_good_looks_like: Business owners know which systems must be restored fastest and what data-loss tolerance is acceptable.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if the organization has at least practical recovery target expectations for critical services.
common_misunderstanding: General urgency is not the same as defining acceptable downtime or data-loss limits.
scoring_note: This control shapes recovery planning quality but depends on backups and restore capability to be meaningful.

question: Kas MFA on kohustuslik administraatori- ja privilegeeritud kontodel?
help: Admin-kontod on ransomware ründaja jaoks eriti väärtuslikud.

attack_mappings.relationship: Identity protection reduces common pre-impact credential compromise and remote access abuse.

why_it_matters: Privileged accounts are a common ransomware objective because they can disable defenses, spread access and impact backups.
what_good_looks_like: Every privileged and administrator account requires MFA, including service provider and emergency access where practical.
evidence_examples: admin account list with MFA status
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if all privileged accounts are covered, not only some of them.
common_misunderstanding: Protecting only standard users does not compensate for missing MFA on admin accounts.
scoring_note: Admin MFA has high weight because privileged credential compromise is one of the fastest routes to ransomware impact.

question: Kas MFA on kasutusel VPN-i, RDP, pilvekonsoolide või muu kaugligipääsu puhul?
help: Kaugligipääs ilma MFA-ta on tavaline ransomware sisenemiskoht.

attack_mappings.relationship: Identity protection reduces common pre-impact credential compromise and remote access abuse.

why_it_matters: Password-only remote access is a common ransomware entry path.
what_good_looks_like: VPN, RDP gateway, cloud admin access and other remote administration paths require MFA.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if remote access consistently requires MFA across the main paths.
common_misunderstanding: MFA on email alone does not protect remote access channels used for administration.
scoring_note: Remote access MFA is weighted heavily because exposed access paths are frequent ransomware entry points.

question: Kas MFA on kasutusel e-posti ja oluliste pilveteenuste puhul?
help: E-post ja pilveteenused on tihti esimene ligipääs või andmelekke koht.

attack_mappings.relationship: Identity protection reduces common pre-impact credential compromise and remote access abuse.

why_it_matters: Email and cloud accounts are common starting points for phishing, account takeover and data access.
what_good_looks_like: MFA is enforced for the main workforce accounts that access email and important cloud services.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if MFA is broadly enforced, not only for a small subset of users.
common_misunderstanding: A policy intention is not the same as confirmed MFA coverage.
scoring_note: This control lowers credential abuse risk but is distinct from privileged and remote access MFA.

question: Kas vanad, kasutamata või lahkunud töötajate kontod eemaldatakse regulaarselt?
help: Ründajad kasutavad sageli unustatud kontosid.

attack_mappings.relationship: Identity protection reduces common pre-impact credential compromise and remote access abuse.

why_it_matters: Unused or forgotten accounts can give ransomware operators a quiet way back into the environment.
what_good_looks_like: Leaver, dormant and unnecessary accounts are removed or disabled on a regular and auditable process.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if old or unused accounts are removed consistently, not ad hoc.
common_misunderstanding: Knowing that accounts should be removed is not the same as a regular process that proves it.
scoring_note: This control supports identity hygiene and reduces hidden persistence risk.

question: Kas organisatsioonil on selge protsess turvauuenduste paigaldamiseks?
help: Näiteks kes vastutab, kuidas prioriteete määratakse ja millal uuendatakse.

attack_mappings.relationship: Timely patching reduces exploit-based access that can lead to ransomware impact.

why_it_matters: Ransomware campaigns frequently exploit missing or delayed security updates.
what_good_looks_like: There is a defined process for prioritizing, approving and applying security updates.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if patching responsibility and cadence are actually defined.
common_misunderstanding: Occasional updates are not the same as a repeatable patching process.
scoring_note: The process question supports the faster patching and exposure questions that follow.

question: Kas kriitilised turvauuendused paigaldatakse tavaliselt 30 päeva jooksul või kiiremini?
help: Internetist ligipääsetavad süsteemid peaksid saama kriitilised parandused kiiremini.

attack_mappings.relationship: Timely patching reduces exploit-based access that can lead to ransomware impact.

why_it_matters: Delayed patching leaves exploitable weaknesses available to attackers for longer.
what_good_looks_like: Critical security updates are usually deployed within 30 days or faster, especially on internet-facing systems.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if critical updates are usually applied within the expected timeframe.
common_misunderstanding: A vendor relationship does not prove that critical patches are applied quickly enough.
scoring_note: This item has high weight because patch timeliness directly affects exposure to known exploitable issues.

question: Kas on teada, millised teenused on internetist ligipääsetavad ja kas need on uuendatud?
help: Näiteks VPN, RDP gateway, veebiserverid, tulemüüri portaalid.

attack_mappings.relationship: Timely patching reduces exploit-based access that can lead to ransomware impact.

why_it_matters: Internet-facing services create direct external attack surface for ransomware entry.
what_good_looks_like: The organization can identify exposed services and confirm their update or compensating control status.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if exposed services are known and regularly reviewed.
common_misunderstanding: Knowing only the VPN or a single web app is not enough if other exposed services are unknown.
scoring_note: This control helps prevent hidden external entry points from being overlooked.

question: Kas vananenud või tootjatoeta süsteemid on teada ja eraldi riskina märgitud?
help: Unsupported süsteemid võivad jääda parandamata haavatavustega tööle.

attack_mappings.relationship: Timely patching reduces exploit-based access that can lead to ransomware impact.

why_it_matters: Unsupported systems can retain unpatched vulnerabilities that remain exploitable.
what_good_looks_like: Legacy or unsupported systems are identified, tracked and treated as explicit risk exceptions.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if unsupported systems are known and tracked as risk.
common_misunderstanding: Not knowing whether unsupported systems exist should be treated as risk, not safety.
scoring_note: This item supports exposure management by making unmanaged legacy risk visible.

question: Kas administraatoriõigused on antud ainult neile, kellel neid päriselt vaja on?
help: Least privilege vähendab ründaja liikumisruumi.

attack_mappings.relationship: Access control reduces privilege escalation and lateral movement before impact.

why_it_matters: Excessive rights give ransomware operators more room to move, disable controls and reach critical assets.
what_good_looks_like: Users and service roles only have the access they need for their work.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if unnecessary standing admin rights are rare and controlled.
common_misunderstanding: Convenience-based admin rights still increase ransomware blast radius.
scoring_note: Least privilege reduces lateral movement and broad impact after initial compromise.

question: Kas administreerimiseks kasutatakse eraldi admin-kontosid, mitte igapäevase töö kontosid?
help: Igapäevane töö admin-kontoga suurendab kompromiteerimise mõju.

attack_mappings.relationship: Access control reduces privilege escalation and lateral movement before impact.

why_it_matters: Using the same account for daily work and administration increases the chance of privileged compromise.
what_good_looks_like: Privileged tasks are done with separate named admin accounts, not everyday user accounts.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if privileged work uses separate accounts in practice.
common_misunderstanding: Occasionally switching context is not the same as maintaining separate privileged identities.
scoring_note: This control limits the effect of phishing or malware hitting a standard user session.

question: Kas privilegeeritud õigusi vaadatakse regulaarselt üle?
help: Näiteks kord kvartalis või pärast rollimuudatusi.

attack_mappings.relationship: Access control reduces privilege escalation and lateral movement before impact.

why_it_matters: Privilege accumulates over time unless it is reviewed and removed.
what_good_looks_like: Privileged rights are reviewed on a defined cadence or after role changes.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if reviews are regular and leave evidence.
common_misunderstanding: A one-time cleanup is not the same as a repeatable review process.
scoring_note: This control helps prevent hidden privileged access from persisting.

question: Kas IT-teenusepakkujate või väliste partnerite ligipääs on piiratud ja kontrollitud?
help: Välistel partneritel ei tohiks olla piiramatut ja jälgimata püsiligipääsu.

attack_mappings.relationship: Access control reduces privilege escalation and lateral movement before impact.

why_it_matters: Service provider or partner access can become a ransomware path if it is broad and weakly monitored.
what_good_looks_like: Third-party access is scoped, reviewed and protected with clear ownership and logging expectations.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if external access is explicitly limited and controlled.
common_misunderstanding: Trusted partner access still needs the same discipline as internal privileged access.
scoring_note: This control addresses a common indirect path into smaller organizations.

question: Kas organisatsioonil on dokumenteeritud incident response plan ransomware olukorra jaoks?
help: Plaan võib olla lühike, aga peab ütlema, kes mida teeb.

attack_mappings.relationship: Prepared response reduces delay after ransomware impact has begun.

why_it_matters: Ransomware response is slower and more chaotic without a documented plan.
what_good_looks_like: There is a short, usable ransomware response plan covering roles, containment, communication and recovery priorities.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if the plan is documented and accessible to the people who need it.
common_misunderstanding: General awareness is not the same as having a plan people can follow under pressure.
scoring_note: This control carries high weight because response coordination strongly affects ransomware impact.

question: Kas rünnaku korral on teada otsustajad, kontaktid ja eskalatsioonitee?
help: Kontaktid peaksid olema kättesaadavad ka siis, kui e-post või Teams ei tööta.

attack_mappings.relationship: Prepared response reduces delay after ransomware impact has begun.

why_it_matters: Clear roles and escalation contacts reduce decision delays during ransomware incidents.
what_good_looks_like: Decision makers, technical owners and external contacts are identified and reachable during an outage.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if the organization knows who decides, who acts and who must be contacted.
common_misunderstanding: Knowing that ?IT will handle it? is not enough during a real outage.
scoring_note: This control supports coordination and timely escalation in the early hours of an incident.

question: Kas incident response plaani on kunagi läbi harjutatud või testitud?
help: Testimata plaan võib kriisi ajal mitte töötada.

attack_mappings.relationship: Prepared response reduces delay after ransomware impact has begun.

why_it_matters: Untested plans often break down under real ransomware pressure.
what_good_looks_like: The ransomware plan has been walked through or tested and the lessons were recorded.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if the plan was actually practiced, not only written.
common_misunderstanding: Reading a plan is not the same as testing whether people can execute it.
scoring_note: Testing improves response confidence and exposes weaknesses before a real incident.

question: Kas on teada, millal kaasata CERT-EE, õiguskaitse, jurist või kindlustuspartner?
help: Ransomware võib tähendada ka andmeleket ja õiguslikke kohustusi.

attack_mappings.relationship: Prepared response reduces delay after ransomware impact has begun.

why_it_matters: Ransomware events can trigger legal, insurance and external reporting decisions under time pressure.
what_good_looks_like: The organization knows when and how to involve CERT, legal counsel, insurers or law enforcement.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if external reporting or escalation expectations are clear.
common_misunderstanding: Knowing a contact name is not the same as knowing when and why to involve them.
scoring_note: This question supports response quality and avoids avoidable delay or confusion.

question: Kas kriitiliste süsteemide logid kogutakse keskelt või on hiljem kättesaadavad?
help: Näiteks serverid, identiteediteenus, pilveteenused, tulemüürid ja kriitilised rakendused.

attack_mappings.relationship: Detection coverage helps identify ransomware behavior before or during impact.

why_it_matters: Ransomware investigation is harder when critical logs are missing or scattered.
what_good_looks_like: Critical logs are centrally collected or otherwise preserved and accessible after an incident.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if the organization can access useful logs from critical systems after an incident.
common_misunderstanding: Generating logs is not enough if nobody can retrieve them when needed.
scoring_note: Centralized logging is weighted heavily because it supports detection, scoping and recovery decisions.

question: Kas endpoint security, antivirus või EDR hoiatusi keegi jälgib ja käsitleb?
help: Oluline on, et hoiatusel oleks omanik ja eskalatsioonitee.

attack_mappings.relationship: Detection coverage helps identify ransomware behavior before or during impact.

why_it_matters: Security tooling only helps if someone sees and handles the alerts it raises.
what_good_looks_like: Endpoint or EDR alerts have an owner, a review process and clear escalation expectations.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if alerts are actively reviewed and handled.
common_misunderstanding: Having antivirus installed is not the same as monitoring and acting on alerts.
scoring_note: This control improves early detection of suspicious activity before full ransomware impact.

question: Kas ebaõnnestunud sisselogimisi või kahtlast ligipääsu jälgitakse?
help: Eriti oluline on jälgida admin-kontosid, VPN-i, e-posti ja pilveteenuseid.

attack_mappings.relationship: Detection coverage helps identify ransomware behavior before or during impact.

why_it_matters: Suspicious login failures can reveal password attacks, credential stuffing or early compromise attempts.
what_good_looks_like: Failed or suspicious sign-ins for critical systems are monitored and investigated when needed.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if someone actively checks this signal for key services or accounts.
common_misunderstanding: The logs existing somewhere is not the same as meaningful monitoring.
scoring_note: This control gives visibility into a common precursor to ransomware access.

question: Kas kriitiliste failide või kaustade massilisi muutusi on võimalik märgata?
help: See võib olla file integrity monitoring, EDR hoiatus või muu massmuudatuste märkamise viis.

attack_mappings.relationship: Detection coverage helps identify ransomware behavior before or during impact.

why_it_matters: Large unexpected file changes can be an early sign of ransomware encryption activity.
what_good_looks_like: The organization has some way to notice mass file change behavior on critical assets.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if mass change behavior would likely trigger an alert or visible signal.
common_misunderstanding: General logging is not the same as detecting suspicious bulk file changes.
scoring_note: This control supports faster detection of encryption impact in progress.

question: Kas on olemas ülevaade haavatavast või vananenud tarkvarast?
help: Piisab praktilisest nimekirjast, raportist või MSP ülevaatest, millel on omanik.

attack_mappings.relationship: Detection coverage helps identify ransomware behavior before or during impact.

why_it_matters: The organization cannot prioritize remediation well if it does not know which vulnerable or outdated software exists.
what_good_looks_like: There is a current practical list or report of vulnerable, unsupported or outdated software with an owner.
how_to_answer: Answer yes only if someone can produce a current list or report when asked.
common_misunderstanding: Assuming the MSP handles it is not the same as being able to verify the current inventory.
scoring_note: This control supports risk visibility and patch prioritization across the environment.

question: Kas töötajad kasutavad paroolihaldurit või on paroolide korduvkasutus kontrolli all?
help: See on vabatahtlik hügieenikontroll ja ei mõjuta ametlikku skoori.

question: Kas töötajatel on MFA kasutusel e-posti ja oluliste tööteenuste puhul?
help: See on vabatahtlik hügieenikontroll ja ei mõjuta ametlikku skoori.

question: Kas töötajad teavad, kuidas kahtlast e-kirja või linki ära tunda ja kuhu sellest teatada?
help: See on vabatahtlik hügieenikontroll ja ei mõjuta ametlikku skoori.

question: Kas tööseadmete operatsioonisüsteemid ja brauserid hoitakse regulaarselt uuendatuna?
help: See on vabatahtlik hügieenikontroll ja ei mõjuta ametlikku skoori.

question: Kas MFA taastamise koodid on turvaliselt hoiustatud?
help: See on vabatahtlik hügieenikontroll ja ei mõjuta ametlikku skoori.
